value.description: Controlled value. When provided, the field is fully controlled by the parent.

defaultValue.description: Initial value for uncontrolled usage. Ignored when `value` is provided.

shortcut.description:
Optional keyboard shortcut hint (e.g. `'⌘K'`). Rendered as a trailing
`<kbd aria-hidden="true">` badge. The shortcut itself is not wired by
this component.
